title: Connect Genie to Microsoft Copilot Cowork (Beta) ​
body:
**June 16, 2026**

You can now connect Genie to Microsoft Copilot Cowork through the Genie managed MCP server, so users can ask natural-language questions about their Databricks data without leaving Copilot Cowork. See [Genie plugin for Microsoft Copilot Cowork](/aws/en/integrations/msft-cowork).

ref_links.text: Genie plugin for Microsoft Copilot Cowork
